mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, discount_amount, paid_amount, paid_at, shipped_at, finished_at, closed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM trade_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT id, order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, discount_amount, paid_amount, paid_at, shipped_at, finished_at, closed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM trade_order WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, discount_amount, paid_amount, paid_at, shipped_at, finished_at, closed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM trade_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_order WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, discount_amount, paid_amount, paid_at, shipped_at, finished_at, closed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM trade_order ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_order (order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, discount_amount, paid_amount, paid_at, shipped_at, finished_at, closed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{orderStatus}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{paidAt}, #{shippedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{closedAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE trade_order SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
